pages.text:
Reasoning
Q1
In each question below are given three
statements 
followed 
by 
two 
conclusions
numbered I and II. You have to take the three
given statements to be true even if they seem
to be at variance with commonly known facts.
Read the statements and then decide which of
the given conclusions logically follows from the
given 
statements, 
disregarding 
commonly
known facts.
Statements:
All Hill are Valley.
A few Valley are Dam.
All Dam are River.
Conclusions:
I. Some River are Hill .
II. No River is Hill
(A) Only conclusion I follow
(B) Only conclusion II follows
(C) Either conclusion I or conclusion II follows
(D) Neither conclusion I nor conclusion II follows
(E) Both conclusion I and conclusion II follows

In each question below are given three
statements 
followed

Statements:

Some Copper are Mercury
All Aluminium are Mercury
Conclusions:
I. No Iron is Mercury
II. Some Copper are Aluminium
(A) Only conclusion I follows
(B) Only conclusion II follows
(C) Either conclusion I or conclusion II follows
(D) Neither conclusion I nor conclusion II follows
(E) Both conclusion I and conclusion II follows

Syllogism

Q4
In 
each 
question 
below 
are 
given 
two
statements 
followed 
by 
two 
conclusions
numbered I and II. You have to take the two
given statements to be true even if they seem
to be at variance with commonly known facts.
Read both the statements and then decide
which of the given conclusions logically follows
from 
the 
given 
statements, 
disregarding
commonly known facts.
 
Statements:
All Pear are Apple.
No Apple is Litchi.
Conclusions:
I. No Litchi is Pear .
II. Some Litchi are not Apple.
(A) Only conclusion I follows
(B) Only conclusion II follows
(C) Either conclusion I or conclusion II follows
(D) Neither conclusion I nor conclusion II follows
(E) Both conclusion I and conclusion II follow

Hints & Solutions
Q1
Text Solution:
Conclusion 1: It does not follow. There are no
direct relation given between River and Hill so,
Some River are Hill does not follow.
Conclusion 2: It does not follow. There are no
direct relation given between River and Hill so,
No River is Hill does not follow.
But here either or case occurs.

direct relation between Copper and Aluminium
so Some Copper are Aluminium does not follow.

Text Solution:

follow.
